pages.text: Cosmic Equipment represents the peak of mortal craftsmanship. By combining Void and Infernal technologies with rare cosmic materials, these items achieve extraordinary power.

pages.title: Tools
pages.text: Cosmic tools can harvest nearly any material encountered throughout the world. Very few substances are capable of resisting their power.

pages.title: Scythes
pages.text: Cosmic Scythes are legendary weapons carried only by the most experienced Void Slayers. Their energy resonates with forces far beyond the mortal realm.

pages.title: Armor
pages.text: Cosmic Armor provides unmatched protection and stability when channeling powerful Void energies. Only those who have mastered the earlier tiers can hope to wield it effectively.
